content.en:
Under normal circumstances, it would be almost impossible for a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse to infiltrate other peak-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

However, Ye Tian comprehended a wisp of the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, and integrated it into his own ultimate rules of ten thousand laws.

At this time, he used the power of the ultimate rules of the space-time extreme path to infiltrate the ultimate formation, and penetrated silently.

Of course.

If this Tidal Ancient Demon had been controlling the ultimate formation, Ye Tian's infiltration would definitely not be able to hide from the other party, but the other party only let the formation be in an automatic opening state, which is also a state that most strong people will take.

Even if it's Ye Tian himself, it's impossible to control the formation all the time, so do you still want to cultivate?

"Who?"

The Tidal Ancient Demon finally discovered that a strong man had infiltrated his dojo, but before he could react, an attack of "one, two, three" struck.

"Demon Blade!"

Faced with this attack, the Tide Ancient Demon sensed death, and he tried to dodge, only to find himself trapped in a dark prison and unable to dodge.

Poof!

With a single blow, the Tide Ancient Demon fell in an instant.

After killing the Tidal Ancient Demon, Ye Tian copied the Tidal Ancient Demon's body, and then controlled the formation here.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian stayed in the dojo for a few more days before heading to the Morning Light Headquarters.

......

"Tidal Ancient Demon, do you want to enter the Silver Lan Realm?"

The painstaking Ancient Demon of the main department of Morning Light looked at the Tidal Ancient Demon in front of him curiously and asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"The Tide Ancient Demon is the treasure land of our Chenguang Lord, you are not the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse of the Chenguang Main, according to the regulations, you can't be allowed to enter the Yinlan Realm. The Painstaking Ancient Demon said.

"Painstaking Ancient Demon, I want to know what it takes to allow me to enter the Yinlan Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

The painstaking ancient demon smiled and said: "It's not impossible to let you enter the Yinlan realm, our Chenguang main department recently discovered a place, which is more dangerous and needs some peak ancient demon-level powerhouses to explore, if you promise to help the Chenguang main department to explore, let you enter the Yinlan realm." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He didn't expect the conditions to enter the Yinlan Realm to be so simple, he thought that there would be many twists and turns.

Now, all he needs to do is explore a treasure trove.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian explored a place according to the requirements of the main department of Chenguang, there were indeed some dangers here, and there were many dangers.

But Ye Tian's strength was too strong, these dangers were nothing to him, and after a while, he came out of that place and revealed the situation inside one by one.

After that, the main department of Chenguang began to develop this treasure land, and the rest of the matter had nothing to do with him.

He got his wish and entered the realm of Yinlan.

......

The Realm of Yinlan.

After Ye Tian came in, he found a place that contained the power of the ultimate rules of the Golden Extreme Dao, and there were several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses here who were contemplating.

Ye Tian didn't interfere with them, he condensed a void with his hands, sat cross-legged by himself, and began to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Golden Extreme Dao here.

His true body in the outside world began to analyze and comprehend.

Gradually, a long period passed.

On this day, Ye Tian successfully comprehended a wisp of the ultimate rule of the golden system extreme path, and began to try to integrate this wisp of the ultimate rule of the golden system extreme path into his own ultimate rule of ten thousand laws.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian successfully integrated the Golden Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule into the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule, but the expected transformation did not happen.

"It's just a little bit of it!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

In fact, he estimated that if he integrated one or two more extreme path ultimate rules, he could make the ultimate rule of ten thousand laws transform, but he didn't expect that it was really a little worse, one extreme path ultimate rule still didn't work, and he had to comprehend another extreme path ultimate rule.

Moreover, with his current realm, the copied body, the ultimate ancient demons may not be able to see through it, maybe there are ultimate ancient demons who can see through him, but it is definitely not the two ordinary ultimate ancient demons in the main department of the morning light.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found out the news.

"Kurosawa Sea .........."

This is a magical sea area born in the Endless Time and Space Domain, and it contains the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao of the Water System, and many peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses have gone to that place at present.

And it's not easy to occupy here, the main coverage is too large, and there is no main department occupying it at the moment.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian passed over for the first time, as a tidal ancient demon.

His true body can't pass over yet, otherwise the ultimate ancient demon of the main department of Dom will definitely kill him if he knows about it.

At that time, he would not be able to comprehend it with peace of mind.

......

Kurosawa Sea.

There are a lot of ancient demon-level powerhouses here, and there are some top ancient demon-level powerhouses who have come over, and they are from several nearby main departments, coming here to find opportunities.

Ye Tian's destination was very clear, it was the place that contained the ultimate rules of the water system.

Soon, he came to the destination. []

"This is it. "

Ye Tian came to a sea area of the Kurosawa Sea, the water here is very special, every drop of water seems to contain countless worlds, the quality is terrifying, and the inside contains a terrifying water power, and a special drop of water appears in the core of this place, containing the power of the ultimate rule of the water system.

However, this drop of water seemed to connect the entire Kurosawa Sea, and it was very difficult for even the ultimate ancient demon to take this drop of water.

Ye Tian didn't dare to guarantee that there would be an Ultimate Ancient Demon trying to take away this drop of water, he had to seize the time to comprehend. 0.6 And so, he began to come to his senses.

Gradually, another long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally comprehended a wisp of the ultimate rule of the water system extreme path, and then began to try to integrate this wisp of the ultimate rule of the water system extreme path into his own ultimate rule of ten thousand laws.

However, after a period of time, Ye Tian left Kurosawa, and he was worried that after the transformation of the ultimate rule of ten thousand laws, this body would also change, thus exposing himself.

So, he quickly left, and let the replica body disintegrate itself anyway.

......

Eagle Ministry.

In the dojo.

Ye Tian completed the last bit of fusion.

And just after the ultimate rules of the water system were integrated into the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws, the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws ushered in a real transformation.
